title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 301.059 - Annual registration fees — passenger-carrying commercial motor vehicles (not including passenger-carrying local commercial motor vehicles, school buses or local transit buses)
text:
301.059.  Annual registration fees — passenger-carrying commercial motor vehicles (not including passenger-carrying local commercial motor vehicles, school buses or local transit buses). — The annual registration fee for passenger-carrying commercial motor vehicles (not including passenger-carrying local commercial motor vehicles, school buses or local transit buses) based on seating capacity is:
(L. 1969 S.B. 242 § 301.060)
